description: A train has arrived at the intermodal yard to be loaded with containers for an inland destination.

nodes.task_description: Receive the train's consist (list of railcars) and the list of containers to be loaded.

expected_outcome.value: Rail planner has the full work order for the train.

nodes.task_description: Generate a sequence of moves for the rail-mounted gantry (RMG) cranes to load the containers onto the correct railcars.

expected_outcome.value: An optimized work queue is created for the RMG crane operators.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch the work to the crane operators and track the progress of the train loading.

expected_outcome.value: Work instructions are sent, and the planner monitors the loading in real-time.
